diagnosis.message: High-urgency response does not state a customer update cadence.
diagnosis.suggested_fix: Require a next-update field for critical and high-priority customer replies.

recommendations.title: Require owner and update cadence for urgent cases
recommendations.rationale: Critical support replies need an assigned owner and clear update cadence to reduce escalation ambiguity.
recommendations.expected_impact: +6 actionability points and lower SLA risk
recommendations.before: High-urgency drafts can omit next-update timing.
recommendations.after: Critical and high-priority drafts include owner, route, urgency, and next-update timing.

summary: Trajectory health score 85.2/100 across 5 selected tickets.
